setup: git -C <linux> checkout <commit>; build the kernel with clang and gen compile_commands.json; kgraph init <linux> → <linux>/.kgraph/kgraph.db
note: All retrieval tasks share this single base_commit — no per-task version switching. The agent explores the tree AT this commit; the KGraph arm queries a kgraph.db built FROM this same commit. (Building kgraph.db runs scip-clang, which is Linux x86-64 only.)
